meta_desc: Installation guide for your inflatable cinema screen. Step-by-step instructions, tips and tricks for a successful projection.
hero_desc: Welcome to our page dedicated to detailed instructions for mounting and dismounting inflatable screens. Explanatory videos and step-by-step tutorials.
videos_desc: Watch our how-to videos to learn how to assemble and disassemble your Hallucine inflatable screens.
videos_youtube: See all our videos on YouTube →
v1_desc: Complete tutorial for setting up a 10-meter inflatable windscreen.
v2_title: How to attach ropes to stakes
v2_desc: Demonstration of how to attach ropes to anchor poles.
v3_desc: How to dismantle and store your inflatable windscreen with ease.
v4_desc: Discover our inflatable screens for outdoor events.
v5_desc: Step-by-step video guide to installing your inflatable screen.
v6_desc: Detailed presentation of our inflatable screens and their features.
guide_desc: Follow these step-by-step instructions to install your inflatable screen safely.
l3_desc: Frame + Projection screen + Bracing fabric + Storage bag
l4_desc: 4 top strings (longest), 4 bottom strings (shortest), 2 middle strings (intermediate length)
e1_caption: Unfolding the bag lengthwise on the tarpaulin
e1_i1: Unroll the green tarpaulin on the ground to protect the area where the screen will be installed.
e1_i2: Unfold the bag lengthwise onto the tarpaulin, making sure to identify the front of the bag (indicated by a white sticker). Do not open the bag at this stage.
e2_i1: Take out the 4 ropes from the bag's 4 pockets and deploy them at right angles (open the zips on the pockets).
e2_i2: Plant 4 anchor stakes, one at the end of each rope.
e2_i3: Attach the 4 bottom ropes to the stakes to secure the base of the screen. Make sure all 4 ropes are taut. For each post, tie a dead turn, then a single stopper knot.
e2_i4: The bag, always closed, will be immobilized in the center of the 4 stakes.
e3_caption: Deploying the screen on the floor
e3_i1: Open the bag and unfold the screen flat on the floor, with the bracing fabric facing the ground.
e4_i1: The screen is now fully unfolded on the floor, ready for the top strings to be attached.
e5_caption: Folding the screen in half on itself
e5_i1: Fold the screen in half on itself.
e5_i2: Attach the 4 ropes to the top of the screen, using the loops provided. Attach two ropes to the right and two to the left, securing them to the same anchor points on the screen.
e5_i3: Unroll the 4 ropes, directing 2 ropes to the pegs at the front of the screen, and the other 2 to the pegs at the back of the screen.
e5_i4: Tie the 4 top ropes to the posts, without tensioning them. The length of each rope depends on the distance between the post and the base of the screen (refer to the abacus supplied).
e6_caption: Unroll the 4 ropes towards the stakes
e6_i1: Direct 2 ropes to the pegs at the front of the screen and the other 2 to the pegs at the back.
e7_i1: Connect the blower to the sleeve on the side of the screen.
e7_i2: Make sure that the zippers on the screen (available in 3 positions: top, bottom and sides of the screen) and the secondary sleeve behind the bottom of the screen are securely closed.
e7_i3: Switch on the blower: the screen will straighten itself.
guide_tip: By following these steps, your projection screen will be correctly installed and ready for use.
cta_desc: Our team is available to help you install your Hallucine products.
